nasb.text: So he spoke also to the men of Penuel, saying, “When I return safely, I will tear down this tower.”

esv.text: And he said to the men of Penuel, “When I come again in peace, I will break down this tower.”

cnv.text: 他亦對毘努伊勒人說：“我平平安安回來的時候，我必拆毀這座望樓。”

ccb.text: 基甸对那里的人说：“我凯旋归来时，必拆毁你们的这座城楼。”
